# Top 50 Masonry contractors in the Ontario, Canada

Find out which Masonry contractors in Ontario stand out for quality workmanship and customer satisfaction.

Select category

Select country

Select state

Select city

17,686 blogs

Total Records in Dataset

883Masonry contractors

Data Freshness

Updated December 26, 2025

If you are searching for the best Masonry Contractors in Ontario, Canada, you're in the right place! This list of Masonry Contractors in Ontario is the best place to start. Ontario has arguably some of the most skilled, experienced, and detail-oriented masonry professionals in the Canada.

Whether you are looking to connect with potential clients, start partnerships, or compete for market visibility, this guide to the top 50 best Masonry Contractors in Ontario will help you find companies that stand out based on craftsmanship, visibility, and engagement.

You'll receive responsible data to increase your outreach and leads. There are 883 Masonry Contractors in Ontario, Canada as of December 26, 2025. Among these contractors, over 323 have provided an email address, and over 827 have a telephone number. Nearly 321 Masonry Contractors offer both email and telephone contact information, giving you direct access to owners, project managers, and stonework specialists.

This top list of Masonry Contractors in Ontario has impressive and unrivaled accuracy and depth to support outreach, target audience research, B2B marketing campaigns, and stone and brick construction initiatives.

The Ontario Masonry Contractors are also very active online. Over 466 have an official website with a contact page, and across social media, over 144 have a Facebook page, 125 have an Instagram account, 30 have an X (formerly Twitter) account, 39 maintain a LinkedIn profile, and around 18 operate YouTube channels. This strong digital presence provides excellent opportunities to engage with contractors committed to visibility, branding, and customer communication.

The Ontario Masonry Contractors also have over 1,302 verified customer ratings, which is beneficial for review monitoring, reputation management, and competitive benchmarking. Whether you are a supplier, service provider, or marketer, this list of the best Masonry Contractors in Ontario will prepare you to connect with trustworthy businesses, identify partnership opportunities, and expand your footprint in one of the most active masonry and construction markets in the Canada.

## Find Masonry contractors in Ontario, Canada

Looking for a reliable masonry contractor in **Ontario, Canada**? You're not alone. With so many homes and businesses investing in brick, stone, and concrete work, choosing the right masonry professional can feel overwhelming. Fortunately, locals consistently recommend a select group of trusted masonry contractors and once you see their craftsmanship, you'll understand why.

Whether you need brickwork, stone walls, patios, driveways, retaining walls, or custom masonry features,Ontario offers a wide range of skilled contractors ready to help. From residential properties to commercial projects, you'll find professionals committed to quality materials, precise workmanship, and durable, beautiful results.

We've put together the **Top 50 Masonry Contractors in Ontario, Canada**, selected based on genuine customer feedback, project quality, and real local recommendations no paid listings or gimmicks. Just expert masons who take pride in enhancing homes and businesses with long-lasting, attractive masonry work. Explore the list, compare your options, and hire a contractor you can trust for your next project.
